command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
AIDER=/home/jose/.local/bin/aider

# Test each flag with --help appended — if usage prints, flag is bad
# Use a real temp file for --message-file and --env-file
echo "test" > /tmp/aider_msg_test.txt

echo "=== INDIVIDUAL FLAG TESTS ==="
for flag in   "--no-auto-commits"   "--no-dirty-commits"   "--no-auto-lint"   "--no-auto-test"   "--no-watch-files"   "--no-stream"   "--no-pretty"   "--no-check-update"   "--no-analytics"   "--yes-always"   "--no-fancy-input"   "--no-notifications"   "--no-detect-urls"   "--disable-playwright"   "--no-suggest-shell-commands"; do
  result=$($AIDER $flag --help 2>&1 | head -1)
  if echo "$result" | grep -q "^usage:"; then
    echo "UNSUPPORTED: $flag"
  else
    echo "OK: $flag"
  fi
done

echo "=== TEST env-file with real file ==="
$AIDER --env-file /tmp/aider_msg_test.txt --help 2>&1 | head -1
echo "=== TEST message-file with real file ==="
$AIDER --message-file /tmp/aider_msg_test.txt --help 2>&1 | head -1
echo "=== TEST config with /dev/null ==="
$AIDER --config /dev/null --help 2>&1 | head -1
' 2>&1
echo DONE_1970
